features.description: From measurement to analysis and gamification — we make good posture fun.

features.title: All You Need Is a Webcam
features.description: Measure your posture in real time using only a front-facing webcam — no additional equipment or side cameras required.

features.title: Real-Time AI Analysis
features.description: Powered by MediaPipe AI technology, the system tracks body landmarks to accurately detect forward head posture.

features.title: Statistics-Based Tracking
features.description: Receive instant sound and on-screen alerts when poor posture is detected to help you maintain proper alignment.

features.title: Instant Notifications
features.description: Analyze daily and weekly average neck angles to monitor posture changes at a glance.

features.title: Privacy Protection
features.description: With client-side AI processing, video data is never sent to a server, ensuring your privacy and security.

features.title: Platform Independent
features.description: A web-based solution that works anytime, anywhere — all you need is a browser.

description.1: All you need is a single camera.
description.2: We detect your posture in real time and notify you instantly when it becomes unhealthy.

fst.title: To provide our service smoothly, we collect the following minimum personal information.

1.label: When signing in with Google
1.text: Email address (for OAuth authentication and user identification)

snd.title: This service requests access to your device's camera to detect forward head posture and measure angles in real time. Our policy for handling this data is as follows.

1.label: Local Processing
1.text: Video data captured through the camera is analyzed in real time only within the user's browser (local environment), that is, on the user's own computer.

2.label: No Storage Principle
2.text: Video data is never transmitted to or stored on any external server or database under any circumstances.

3.text: The collected personal information is used solely for user account management, smooth service operation, and statistical analysis for service improvement.

4.text: If a user requests account deletion or when the purpose of collecting and using personal information has been fulfilled, the relevant information is destroyed without delay. Identifiable information stored in the database is permanently deleted in an irrecoverable manner.

5.text: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at the email address below.

1.text: These terms aim to stipulate the conditions of use, rights, obligations, and responsibilities for the 'Turtle Turtle Turtle Neck' service (hereinafter referred to as the 'Service').

2.text: This Service utilizes the device's camera to analyze the user's posture in real-time, determining the presence of a forward head posture to provide feedback. The features of the Service may be changed or suspended without prior notice for performance improvements or operational needs.

3.title: The posture analysis and feedback provided by this Service are for reference purposes only, based on an AI model (Pose Estimation).

1.label: Non-Medical Device
1.text: This Service is not a medical device intended for professional medical diagnosis, prevention, or treatment.

2.label: Consult a Specialist
2.text: If you experience pain or health issues related to your posture, you must consult a medical professional rather than relying solely on the results provided by this Service.

4.text: Users must not use the Service by misappropriating others' personal information, such as email addresses, and must not use the camera feature in any way that infringes upon the portrait rights or privacy of others.

5.text: This Service is provided free of charge and does not guarantee 100% accuracy of the AI model's analysis results. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damages or data loss arising from the use of the Service.

ContactPage.title: Contact & Feedback
ContactPage.description: Thank you for using the 'BoogiBoogi' service! If you have any questions or would like to leave feedback, please reach out using the methods below.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.text: Please leave your comments to help us improve the service.

1.title: Position your device directly in front of you.

description.1: Our AI model is optimized for front-facing postures to best suit typical laptop work environments!
description.2: Please leave us feedback if you'd like to see a side-profile measurement feature! ☺️

2.title: Maintain your usual working or studying posture.

description.1: Turtle neck detection is based on your initial posture captured right when the measurement starts.
description.2: Keeping the camera angle and direction steady will greatly improve the accuracy of our body tracking!

3.title: Light clothing and tied-up hair help improve accuracy.

description.1: Our AI calculates your posture angle by tracking the positions of your ears and shoulders.
description.2: Accuracy may drop if your shoulder lines are hidden by bulky clothes or long, loose hair!
